'''鈭歱-g-p-th''' ('''kapagpethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:querk|querk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-g-p-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:querk|querk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-g-p-th
|-
! Lemma
| kapagpethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipagpethoko|thipagpethoko]] || [[word:jipagpethoko|jipagpethoko]] || [[word:shipagpethoko|shipagpethoko]] || [[word:kipagpethoko|kipagpethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupagpethoko|thuthupagpethoko]] || [[word:jujupagpethoko|jujupagpethoko]] || [[word:shushupagpethoko|shushupagpethoko]] || [[word:kukupagpethoko|kukupagpethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupagpethoko|thupagpethoko]] || [[word:jupagpethoko|jupagpethoko]] || [[word:shupagpethoko|shupagpethoko]] || [[word:kupagpethoko|kupagpethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupagpethoko|thupagpethoko]] || [[word:jupagpethoko|jupagpethoko]] || [[word:shupagpethoko|shupagpethoko]] || [[word:kupagpethoko|kupagpethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepagpethoko|thepagpethoko]] || [[word:jepagpethoko|jepagpethoko]] || [[word:shepagpethoko|shepagpethoko]] || [[word:kepagpethoko|kepagpethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopagpethoko|thothopagpethoko]] || [[word:jojopagpethoko|jojopagpethoko]] || [[word:shoshopagpethoko|shoshopagpethoko]] || [[word:kokopagpethoko|kokopagpethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopagpethoko|thopagpethoko]] || [[word:jopagpethoko|jopagpethoko]] || [[word:shopagpethoko|shopagpethoko]] || [[word:kopagpethoko|kopagpethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopagpethoko|thopagpethoko]] || [[word:jopagpethoko|jopagpethoko]] || [[word:shopagpethoko|shopagpethoko]] || [[word:kopagpethoko|kopagpethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙pagpethoko|th忙pagpethoko]] || [[word:j忙pagpethoko|j忙pagpethoko]] || [[word:sh忙pagpethoko|sh忙pagpethoko]] || [[word:k忙pagpethoko|k忙pagpethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapagpethoko|thathapagpethoko]] || [[word:jajapagpethoko|jajapagpethoko]] || [[word:shashapagpethoko|shashapagpethoko]] || [[word:kakapagpethoko|kakapagpethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapagpethoko|thapagpethoko]] || [[word:japagpethoko|japagpethoko]] || [[word:shapagpethoko|shapagpethoko]] || [[word:kapagpethoko|kapagpethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapagpethoko|thapagpethoko]] || [[word:japagpethoko|japagpethoko]] || [[word:shapagpethoko|shapagpethoko]] || [[word:kapagpethoko|kapagpethoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
